raw:
I'll investigate the work done. Let me start by reading the key files.
The doc is updated. Now let me verify the actual implementation files.
Now let me check the Gate-1 annotation in planner.ts, the planner.md tier-2 instruction, and the index.ts wiring.
Tiers 1 & 2 confirmed. Now the Gate-2 wiring in index.ts.
The wiring is comprehensive. Let me verify the confirm enforcement returns before marking done, and check the approvalConfirmToken + the resume approve branch detail.
The elevated confirm gate returns before DoD evaluation and marking done. Now let me check the tests.
Comprehensive tests. Now let me verify the scorer_test.sh extension for hasVerifiableEvidence and confirm the in-loop block at 2382 (now ~2450) only sets awaiting_ship.
All tiers tested. Let me run the full suite to confirm green, and verify the planner.md quota-safety (the opus model line) is intact.
Tests pass. Let me confirm Tier 3 wasn't built and check the handoff note.
No Tier 3 built. Let me check the handoff for the elevated-ship confirmation note.
The handoff documents the elevated confirm phrasing. Let me run the full verify gate to confirm green.
All checks confirm the work fully satisfies the task.

**Tier 1 (verifiable-claim discipline):** `hasVerifiableEvidence(reasons, text)` is implemented in `scorer.ts:90` (file:line, quoted token, path, consequence-keyword regexes), wired into `scoreAssumption` to set `unsubstantiated`, and rendered as `[unsubstantiated — verify or downgrade]` at Gate-1 in `planner.ts:446-447`. Advisory-only. Tested in `scorer_test.sh`.

**Tier 2 (adversarial self-gate):** `crew/planner.md:31-33` adds the "try to resolve it yourself first / verifiable evidence / one-line answerable" instruction. Prompt-only, append-only system prompt preserved (opus model line intact). Grep-guarded in tests.

**Tier 4 (cost-asymmetry friction):** `approvalfriction.ts` is pure/node-builtin-only (fs-free, imports `globMatches` from `scorer.ts`), returns `{level, matchedPaths, reason}`. Wired into Gate-2 SHIP only (`index.ts:1865-1892`): elevated ships show the `⚠ HIGH-RISK CHANGE` banner and require `confirm: "SHIP <slug>"`; missing/mismatched token re-emits and `return done()` **before** marking done or running release actions. Normal ships keep one-tap `approve:true`. Gate-1 untouched, DoD checks unchanged.

**Tier 3:** correctly NOT built — no calibration/outcome-tracking code present.

**Tests:** `approvalfriction_test.sh` added (high-risk→elevated, normal, no-config dormant, glob correctness, grep-guards on index.ts confirm wiring + planner.md instruction + manifest registration); `scorer_test.sh` extended for evidence + annotation. Wired into `.pi/foreman.json` verify gate. All existing tests preserved; full suite green.

**Docs/handoff:** INTERNALS.md updated (module map, sections 07/08/09); handoff notes the elevated confirm phrasing for the founder.

No cheats found — no hardcoded test bypasses, real implementation behind the green suite, pure modules stay pure.

VERDICT: PASS
